name: Banana Streusel Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare and roll out pie crust. Place the pastry in a 9-inch pie plate.
2. Line the unpricked pastry shell with a double thickness of foil.
3. Bake the pastry for 8 minutes in a 450°F (232°C) oven. Remove the foil.
4. Bake an additional 4-6 minutes, or until the pastry is golden. Remove from the oven.
5. Reduce the oven temperature to 375°F (190°C).
6. In a medium mixing bowl, gently toss together bananas, pineapple juice, and lemon juice. Drain, reserving juices.
7. Gently toss the bananas with lemon peel, sugar, and cinnamon.
8. Pour the mixture into the pastry shell.
9. In a small saucepan, combine the reserved juices and cornstarch. Cook and stir over medium heat until thickened and bubbly. Pour over the banana mixture in the shell.
10. For the streusel topping, combine flour, brown sugar, nuts, and cinnamon. With a pastry blender or 2 forks, cut in the butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
11. Sprinkle the streusel mixture evenly over the banana mixture.
12. Cover the edge of the pie with foil.
13. Bake in a 375°F (190°C) oven for 40 minutes, or until the topping is golden and the edges are bubbly. Cool on a wire rack.
